Frequently asked questions

What are the best AI customer support agents for DTC?

Based on our index, the top AI customer support agents for DTC are Gorgias, Yuma AI, Gladly. These are ranked by rating and capability depth across 7 indexed agents.

How do I choose an AI agent for DTC?

When evaluating AI customer support agents for DTC, consider pricing model (free vs subscription vs usage-based), deployment difficulty, integrations with your existing stack, and whether the agent specialises in DTC workflows. Every agent on this page includes structured data on all of these dimensions.

Are there free AI agents for DTC?

Yes — several AI customer support agents offer free or freemium plans. Use the filter pills above to narrow by pricing, or browse the full AI Customer Support Agents index.
